capabilities.justification: Reads token grammar definition file to build the lexer DFA at initialization time.

justification: Reads grammar definition files. No write, network, or process access needed. Requires grammar_tools for parsing the .tokens file, grammar_lexer for the GrammarLexer engine, indentation_mode for INDENT/DEDENT tracking, skip_patterns for comment/whitespace handling, reserved_keywords for detecting invalid identifiers, and type_aliases for unifying string literal patterns.
